g.text: N-Queens n=4 | board=4x4 | isValid checks: up col, left-diag, right-diag
│ ├── i=0: isValid(r1,c0)? up: board[0][0]=Q → FAIL ✗ → skip
│ ├── i=1: isValid(r1,c1)? left-diag: board[0][0]=Q → FAIL ✗ → skip
│ │ ├── i=1: isValid(r2,c1)? R-diag: board[0][3]? no. L-diag: board[1][0]? no. up: no → wait R-diag from [2][1]: [1][2]=Q → FAIL ✗

svg.text: │ │ // ALL cols fail in row=2 → backtrack

g.text: │ └── i=3: isValid(r1,c3)? up=none, L-diag: board[0][2]=. ok, R-diag: oob → YES ✓
│ ├── i=1: up=none, L-diag: board[1][0]=. board[0][-1]=oob, R-diag: board[1][2]=. board[0][3]=Q wait... R-diag(r2,c1): [1][2]=. [0][3]=Q → FAIL ✗
│ └── i=3: up=none, L-diag: board[0][2]=. ok, R-diag: oob → YES ✓
│ ├── i=0: up=none, L-diag=oob, R-diag: board[1][1]=. board[0][2]=. → YES ✓
│ │ ├── i=2: up=none, L-diag: board[2][1]=. board[1][0]=. board[0][-1]=oob. R-diag: board[2][3]=. board[1][4]=oob → YES ✓
│ ├── i=2: L-diag: board[1][1]=. board[0][0]=. R-diag: board[1][3]=Q → FAIL ✗
│ │ ├── i=1: R-diag: board[1][2]=. board[0][3]=. ok. L-diag: board[1][0]=Q → FAIL ✗
│ │ ├── i=1: up=none,L-diag: board[2][0]=. board[1][-1]=oob, R-diag: board[2][2]=. board[1][3]=. board[0][4]=oob → YES ✓
│ ├── i=1: up: board[0][1]=. L-diag: board[0][0]=. R-diag: board[0][2]=Q → FAIL ✗

svg.text: └── dfs(row=1) → for i=0 to 3: (symmetric to col=0 branch, both solutions already found)

g.text: ├── i=0: R-diag: board[0][1]=. board[0][2]=. L-diag: oob → YES ✓ → board=["...Q","Q...","....","...."] → row2 all fail → backtrack
├── i=1: R-diag: board[0][2]=. board[0][3]=Q wait check → L-diag: board[0][0]=. R-diag: board[0][2]=Q → FAIL ✗
├── i=2: L-diag: board[0][1]=. R-diag: board[0][3]=Q → wait L from(1,2): [0][1]=. ok. R from(1,2): [0][3]=Q → FAIL ✗
